title: Workato Developer
description:
As a Workato Developer, you will be responsible for designing, building, and maintaining scalable and secure integrations across cloud and on-premise systems using the Workato platform. This includes developing interfaces that enable seamless data exchange, automation of workflows, and orchestration of business processes. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in Workato's integration platform and stay current with emerging capabilities, particularly in AI-powered automation.

RESPONSIBILITIES
- Design and develop integration recipes connecting cloud applications, databases, and on-premise systems using Workato's iPaaS platform
- Build and maintain data synchronization workflows ensuring accurate, real-time data flow between business systems
- Implement Workato AI agents and conversational automation to enhance business processes and employee productivity
- Create custom connectors and API integrations for proprietary or less common systems
- Develop reusable recipe functions and callable recipes to maintain scalability and code efficiency
- Optimize recipe performance, handle error scenarios, and implement retry logic for mission-critical integrations
- Collaborate with business stakeholders to translate requirements into technical automation solutions
- Document integration architectures, data mappings, and process flows
- Monitor integration health, troubleshoot issues, and implement proactive alerting
- Stay current with Workato platform updates and emerging AI automation capabilities

PROFILE
- Minimum Bachelors Degree in Computer Science, IT or any relevant specialisation.
- Proven 4-7 years of hands-on experience with Workato platform development.
- Strong understanding of RESTful APIs, webhooks, and authentication protocols (OAuth, API keys, JWT)
- Proficiency in Workato recipe development including triggers, actions, conditional logic, and data transformations
- Experience with Workato Workbot and conversational automation interfaces
- Knowledge of Workato AI agents, including configuration, training, and integration with business workflows
- Understanding of data integration patterns: real-time sync, batch processing, event-driven architecture
- Experience integrating common SaaS platforms such as Salesforce, ServiceNow, NetSuite, Slack, or similar
- Solid grasp of data formats including JSON, XML, and CSV
- Ability to write and debug formula mode expressions in Workato' s Ruby-based syntax
- Workato certification (Professional Automation or AI Automation)
Experience with Workato' s connector SDK for building custom adapters
- Familiarity with RPA tools and how they complement iPaaS solutions
- Background in software development with languages like Python, JavaScript, or Ruby
- Understanding of AI/ML concepts and prompt engineering for agent-based automation
- Experience with API management and governance practices
- Knowledge of enterprise architecture patterns and middleware concepts

Technical Skills
- Workato recipe design and development
- Workato AI agents and intelligent automation
- Data mapping and transformation logic
- API integration and connector development
- Error handling and exception management
- Version control and deployment practices
- SQL and database concepts
- Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)

optimisation, usefulness, desirability and user / client satisfaction in the journeys, touchpoints & functionalities of the websites, apps and digital solutions that we deliver.

 Planning & Strategizing 
o Collaborate with clients and/or team members to refine project requirements, prioritise 
tasks, pinpoint key UX journeys, identify appropriate UX research & testing methods, 
develop design concepts, etc. to deliver innovative, workable and compelling solutions 
o Develop UX strategies and solutions that best capture project requirements while being 
human-centred, forward-thinking, and in-line with current digital / media trends 
o Develop UX decks; propose / pitch UX solutions to clients

o Conduct UX discovery workshops with stakeholders, business owners, etc. 
o Convert workshop findings into actionable results; define project next steps pertaining to UX 
research approach, content & design direction, etc. 

 UI/UX Design 
o Design (or assist in the design of) wireframes, mock ups, prototypes, etc. based on the 
results of workshops, usability testing and/or user / client feedback.

 Usability Testing 
o Design, manage and/or execute usability studies, surveys and other user research. 
o Convert usability test findings into actionable results; determine ways to track and measure 
the effectiveness of newly implemented UX solutions. 

 UX Testing & Review 
o Review and/or conduct user testing and other user-facing activities to validate content, 
design, touchpoints, and more. 
o Synthesize findings to provide recommendations, inform a better understanding of 
customers, give insights into business value, and identify potential usability issues & design

 Other

title: Global HRIS Expert

Sika has subsidiaries in 103 countries around the world, produces in over 400 factories, and develops innovative technologies for customers worldwide. In doing so, it plays a crucial role in enabling the transformation of the construction and transportation industries toward greater environmental compatibility. Approximately 33,000 employees generated CHF 11.20 billion in sales in 2025.

ROLE PURPOSE
The HRIS / HRSD Implementation Specialist is responsible for supporting the implementation and continuous improvement of the HR Service Delivery (HRSD) solution, ensuring alignment with global HR processes and business needs.
The role focuses on analysing current HR processes, defining target (to-be) processes, and enabling efficient, standardised, and scalable HR service delivery supported by digital tools.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
1. HRSD Implementation & System Support
	Support the global implementation of HRSD (ServiceNow) across regions and countries
	Contribute to the configuration and design of HR services, case management, and workflows
	Ensure alignment between HRSD, SuccessFactors, and other HR systems
	Support testing activities (UAT, functional testing) and implementation rollout
	Provide ongoing system support, including issue resolution and enhancement proposals 

2. Process Analysis & Design (Core Responsibility)
	Analyse existing (as-is) HR processes across key HR service areas
	Identify inefficiencies, bottlenecks, and improvement opportunities
	Design and document standardised to-be processes aligned with global HR principles and system capabilities
	Facilitate workshops with HR stakeholders to simplify and standardise processes
	Ensure processes are scalable, compliant, and fit for digital execution

3. Service Design & HR Service Catalogue
	Support the definition and continuous improvement of the HR Service Catalogue
	Define which activities should be managed as cases, service requests, or knowledge articles
	Ensure clarity of service ownership, roles, and responsibilities
	Align service definitions with the target operating model and business requirements 
 
4. Stakeholder Collaboration & Change Management
	Collaborate with global HR, regional teams, and business stakeholders
	Act as a bridge between HR, IT, and implementation partners
	Support change management, communication, and adoption of HRSD
	Provide guidance and training materials for end users
5. Continuous Improvement & Data-Driven HR
	Monitor system performance, usage, and adoption
	Support reporting and data analysis to identify improvement opportunities
	Drive automation and standardisation initiatives
	Contribute to enhancing employee experience and operational efficiency

QUALIFICATIONS & EXPERIENCE
10+ years of relevant experience in HRIS / HRIT roles
 Bachelors degree in HR, IT, Business Administration, or related field
 Experience with HR systems (e.g., ServiceNow HRSD, SAP SuccessFactors) with strong knowledge of HRIS tools and processes
 Experience in HR process design, process optimization, or digital transformation initiatives
 Must have experience working in large, global, and decentralized organizations
 Must have experience as an HRIS Consultant
 Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
 Experience in supporting or implementing HR systems in end-to-end project environments is an advantage
 Exposure to HR application support, system configuration, or HR service delivery processes is preferred

KEY COMPETENCIES
 Process-oriented thinking and strong analytical mindset
 Structured and detail-oriented approach
 Strong communication and stakeholder management skills
 Ability to operate effectively in large, global, cross-functional, and decentralized organizations is essential
 Proactive and solution-driven attitude
 Interest in digitalization, automation, and HR transformation
 Strong expertise in HR systems, tools, and end-to-end HR process understanding
 Ability to analyse HR processes and translate business requirements into system or process improvements
 Familiarity with HR service delivery concepts such as case management, incident handling, and workflow automation is an advantage

title: AI Engineer
description:
Core Responsibilities
	Implement individual agents and sub-agents within the ADK framework  including intent routing agents, FAQ agents, transactional agents, and escalation agents.
	Write, test, and iterate on system prompts templates for each market use case.
	Build tool-use integrations connecting agents to external APIs: knowledge bases, MCP lookup, booking systems, and notification services.
	Run offline and online evaluation experiments using standard chatbot metrics (intent accuracy, task completion, CSAT) and document findings.
	Participate actively in code reviews; implement feedback from Senior AI Engineers/AI Lead promptly.
	Maintain vector database collections: chunking strategies, embedding models, indexing pipelines, and retrieval evaluation.
	Support AI Translators in localizing prompts and agent responses for each market language  providing technical input on character limits, tokenization quirks, and language-model behaviour.
	Reproduce, document, and escalate production bugs related to agent behaviour, model hallucinations, and tool failures.
	Keep implementation documentation up to date: agent flow diagrams, prompt registries, and test result logs.
Key Qualifications
	5+ years of AI/ML engineering experience; at least 2 year building or integrating conversational AI or LLM-based products.
	Demonstrable hands-on experience with Google Cloud AI stack
	Solid understanding of transformer models, tokenisation, context windows, and prompt sensitivity.
	Familiarity with agentic patterns: ReAct, plan-and-execute, reflection loops, and multi-agent handoff protocols.
	Comfortable working in an agile sprint environment with clearly defined tickets and daily standups.
	Basic understanding of responsible AI and data privacy considerations  knowing when to flag concerns to seniors.

title: Finance Manager
description:
Prepare and review interim and annual filings (6K & 20F) with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.
Review and comments to Audited Financial Statement for the group and Subsidiaries.

title: Senior Mobile Developer
description:
We are looking for a Senior Mobile Developer (Android) to lead the development of secure, low-latency applications for our next-generation smart POS terminals. You will bridge the gap between secure payment software and Android-based hardware peripherals.
 
Key Responsibilities:
- Hardware & Peripheral Integration: Architect, develop, and optimize native Android applications that interface directly with smart POS terminal hardware, customized Android ROMs, and hardware peripherals via USB, Bluetooth, and Serial/UART communication.
- Payment Ecosystem Development: Implement, test, and maintain secure cryptographic payment applications complying with EMV Co, PCI-DSS, and local payment gateway protocols.
- Firmware & SDK Management: Work closely with hardware manufacturers and firmware engineers to integrate, debug, and optimize proprietary Android SDKs, HAL (Hardware Abstraction Layers), and payment kernels.
- Core Mobile Architecture: Write highly efficient, deterministic, and testable Kotlin/Java code using modern architectural patterns (MVVM, MVI) optimized for low-resource embedded Android POS devices.
- Performance & Stability Tuning: Debug deep architectural issues, manage memory leaks, optimize battery/power consumption, and ensure 99.9% app uptime on distributed IoT/POS terminal fleets.

What Were Looking For:
- Education: Bachelors Degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Electronic Engineering, or a highly technical equivalent field.
- Experience: Minimum of 35+ years of core experience in Native Android development (Kotlin/Java), with a heavily proven track record in FinTech, Payment Terminals (Smart POS), or Android IoT environments.
- Hardware/Protocol Deep-Dive: Direct, hands-on experience interfacing Android apps with hardware components (e.g., Serial communication, NDK/JNI, USB/BLE peripherals, or Android POS SDKs from manufacturers like Pax, Ingenico, Verifone, or Sunmi).
- Technical Stack Expertise: Mastery of asynchronous programming (Coroutines, Flow), Jetpack libraries, Retrofit, and dependency injection frameworks (Hilt/Dagger).
- Payment Standards Knowledge: Strong understanding of payment processing workflows, ISO 8583 protocols, EMV compliance, or cryptographic standards (AES, DES, RSA) used in financial tech.

Preferred / Bonus Qualifications
- Experience with custom Android ROM/AOSP development or Android Firmware modification.
- Prior exposure to hybrid frameworks like React Native in a hardware-interfacing context.
- Experience managing over-the-air (OTA) application deployment for large-scale device fleets (MDM solutions).

You will be responsible for identifying and developing new business opportunities with corporate clients including SMEs, MNCs, and government sectors, while engaging decision-makers such as HR Managers, Learning and Development teams, and department heads to understand their training needs. You will promote HRDC-claimable training solutions and guide clients through the funding process, while preparing customized proposals, quotations, and training plans that match their requirements. You will manage the full sales cycle from lead generation to closing, while building and maintaining long-term client relationships to encourage repeat business and upselling opportunities. You will also work closely with internal teams such as training coordinators and trainers to ensure smooth delivery of programs, while consistently achieving and exceeding monthly and quarterly sales targets.

The ideal candidate should possess a diploma or degree in Business, Marketing, IT, or a related field, along with one to three years of experience in B2B sales, corporate sales, or training-related sales, although fresh graduates with strong drive and willingness to learn are encouraged to apply. You should have strong communication, negotiation, and presentation skills, with the ability to understand business challenges and propose solution-based offerings confidently. You are expected to be self-motivated, target-driven, and results-oriented, with the confidence to engage corporate clients and uncover real needs. Experience in HRDC claimable training or the corporate training industry will be an added advantage, but not mandatory.

In return, you will receive a competitive basic salary along with an attractive commission structure where high performers are able to significantly increase their earnings based on results. You will have the opportunity to work with well-known corporate clients across Malaysia while gaining exposure to high-demand training domains such as Artificial Intelligence, Data, Cybersecurity, and Digital Transformation. This role offers clear career progression into senior consultant or business development roles, supported by a collaborative environment with strong marketing and lead generation support. You will also benefit from continuous learning opportunities and access to training programs, while working in a flexible and dynamic environment that encourages growth and performance. At GemRain, we focus on delivering real business outcomes through training, and you will play a key role in helping companies transform their workforce through practical and impactful learning solutions.

description:

title: Manual Tester
description:
User Acceptance Tester (UAT) is responsible for ensuring that software or technology meets the requirements and expectations of its end users. Their job is to test software applications, websites, or other technology systems to ensure that they are working as intended and that they meet the needs of the users who will be utilizing them.



Responsibilities

Developing test cases and scenarios based on user requirements and acceptance criteria.
Conducting testing on the system to ensure that it is functioning properly and meeting user needs.
Identifying and reporting defects or issues found during testing.
Collaborating with development teams to ensure that defects are fixed and requirements are met.
Providing feedback to product owners and other stakeholders regarding the user experience and any issues that were identified during testing.
Documenting test results and providing reports to stakeholders.


Requirement

Bachelor's degree in computer science, engineering, or related field.
Strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and the ability to work independently as well as part of a team. 
Should also possess good communication skills and be able to effectively convey any issues or defects found during testing.
Experience with Agile development methodologies.
Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and adapt to changing priorities.

description:

title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
description:
Job Summary
We are seeking a results-driven Technical Recruiter to support client-based hiring across multiple projects. This role involves managing both contract and permanent placements, with a strong focus on niche technical roles and aggressive timelines. The recruiter will work closely with clients and internal stakeholders to deliver high-quality talent within defined SLAs.

Key Responsibilities
-Manage end-to-end recruitment for client projects (contract and permanent roles)
-Partner with clients and account managers to understand project requirements, timelines, and hiring priorities
-Source and attract candidates for niche and hard-to-fill technical roles (e.g., niche skillsets, legacy systems, specialized tech stacks)
-Build and maintain a strong pipeline of pre-screened candidates for ongoing and upcoming project needs
-Conduct initial screenings (technical + behavioral) to ensure candidate fit
-Ensure timely submission of qualified candidates within agreed turnaround time (TAT)
-Coordinate interviews and manage communication between candidates and clients
-Drive offer management, negotiation, and onboarding for both contract and permanent hires
-Track and report recruitment metrics (submission rate, interview-to-offer ratio, time-to-fill, etc.)
-Ensure compliance with client requirements, documentation, and onboarding processes
-Maintain strong candidate relationships for redeployment opportunities (especially for contract roles)

Requirements
-Bachelors degree in HR, Business, IT, or related field
-Minimum of 3 years of experience in technical recruitment within staffing / vendor / outsourcing environment
-Proven experience handling both contract staffing and permanent placements
-Experience working on client-driven hiring (RPO, MSP, or agency model)
-Strong exposure to niche and hard-to-fill tech roles
-Ability to work under pressure with tight deadlines and multiple concurrent requirements

title: Sr Consultant - B2B Partner Marketing
description:
Are you ready to unleash your potential?

 

At Deloitte, our purpose is to make an impact that matters for our clients, our people, and the communities we serve.

 

We believe we have a responsibility to be a force for good, and WorldImpact is our portfolio of initiatives focused on making a tangible impact on societys biggest challenges and creating a better future. We strive to advise clients on how to deliver purpose-led growth and embed more equitable, inclusive as well as sustainable business practices.

 

Hence, we seek talented individuals driven to excel and innovate, working together to achieve our shared goals.

We are committed to creating positive work experiences that foster a culture of respect and inclusion, where diverse perspectives are celebrated, and everyone is recognised for their contributions.

 

Ready to unleash your potential with us? Join the winning team now!

The ideal candidate will move between managing scaled execution programs and maintaining the operational framework that tracks their success. This role is responsible for the end-to-end management of data reporting, campaign execution, and the logistical backend for partner marketing initiatives.
The ideal candidate must be highly data-literate, capable of translating complex pipeline metrics into actionable operational insights while simultaneously managing high-volume execution programs.

Key Responsibilities:

Own the End-to-End Pipeline Data Strategy: Design and maintain the reporting frameworks and data hygiene necessary to track partner-sourced pipeline progress. Develop and manage 'early warning' dashboards to proactively identify funnel gaps, ensuring accurate attribution and ROI measurement.
Ensure System Compliance and Flawless Execution: Demonstrate expert-level operational command of internal partner marketing platforms, MDF tools, and analytics dashboards to guarantee compliance and flawless campaign execution across the region.
Manage Financial and Logistical Backend: Oversee the entire logistical process for regional initiatives, including the end-to-end management of sponsorship contracts, invoicing, and budget compliance.
Accelerate Customer Context Creation: Own the process for turning successful partner nominations into published customer stories, working with cross-functional stakeholders to significantly reduce the production timeline from nomination to publication.
Translate market Intelligence into Scalable SEA Support: Gather critical, on-the-ground market intelligence from the Indonesian ecosystem. Synthesize these qualitative insights with quantitative data to provide actionable recommendations for sales leadership and develop scalable "partner-in-a-box" assets for broader SEA support.
Your role as a leader:

 

At Deloitte, we believe in the importance of empowering our people to be leaders at all levels. We connect our purpose and shared values to identify issues as well as to make an impact that matters to our clients, people and the communities. Additionally,  Consultants  across our Firm are expected to:

Demonstrate a strong commitment to personal learning and development.
Understand how our daily work contributes to the priorities of the team and business.
Understand the set expectations and demonstrate accountability in keeping personal performance on track.
Actively focus on developing effective communications and relationship-building skills with stakeholders, clients and team.
Demonstrate an appreciation for working with others.
Understand what is fundamental to Deloittes success as a business.
Demonstrate integrity and an awareness of strengths, differences, and personal impact.
Develop their understanding of Deloitte and offer a fresh perspective.

Demonstrable experience navigating the complex channel ecosystems of SEA markets, with a proven track record of successful execution in high-growth markets like Indonesia.

title: SPECIALIST AI RESEARCH & ENGINEERING
description:
Job Summary:	
Specialist  AI Research & Engineering is responsible for developing high-quality AI models, performing rigorous experimentation, and enabling scalable deployment into production environments. The role requires collaboration with data engineers, DevOps, and product teams to translate research into usable systems. The specialist is expected to stay ahead of the curve with emerging AI/ML methodologies and to support the delivery of AI solutions that meet both performance and reliability standards.

Principle Duties & Responsibilities:	
	Design and execute experiments to develop, fine-tune, and validate machine learning and deep learning models for various AI use cases.
	Collaborate with data engineers to preprocess, curate, and analyze datasets for supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning.
	Build scalable pipelines for training, evaluation, and versioning of models in production environments.
	Support the deployment of models into live systems, ensuring latency, accuracy, and stability targets are met.
	Integrate open-source models, foundation models, or in-house architectures into business solutions.
	Monitor performance metrics and model drift and assist in re-training and updating models as needed.
	Collaborate with MLOps, DevOps, and infrastructure teams to streamline AI model lifecycle management.
	Contribute to technical documentation and knowledge sharing across the AI Engineering and Applied Research teams.
	Stay current with academic and industry trends in machine learning and AI, recommending tools or frameworks for adoption.
	Participate in cross-functional sprint planning and provide model-related support to downstream engineering teams.


Key Challenges of the Roles:	
	Balancing the trade-offs between model complexity, performance, and deployment feasibility in real-time applications.
	Adapting to rapidly evolving AI technologies and ensuring alignment with enterprise-scale requirements.
	Managing data quality, inconsistency, and availability issues that may impact model performance.
	Ensuring models are interpretable, fair, and comply with ethical AI standards and regulations.
	Coordinating effectively with multiple stakeholders including researchers, software engineers, DevOps, and business users.
	Optimizing models for environments with limited computing resources or strict latency constraints.
	Scaling model training and serving infrastructure to handle growing user demands and workloads.

Qualifications / Work experience /Skills:	
	Bachelors degree in computer science, Engineering,
Mathematics, or equivalent professional experience.
	Minimum 13 years of hands-on experience in machine learning model development and deployment.
	Experience working with TensorFlow, PyTorch, HuggingFace, Scikit-learn, or equivalent ML libraries.
	Exposure to version control (e.g., Git), model registries, experiment tracking, and deployment tools.
	Strong grasp of machine learning fundamentals including supervised, unsupervised, and deep learning approaches.
	Knowledge of transformer models, embeddings, and vector database integration is an added advantage.
	Familiarity with MLOps concepts such as model monitoring, retraining, CI/CD for ML workflows.
	Proficient in Python; additional experience in data engineering or cloud-based ML platforms is a plus.
	Strong analytical skills and ability to translate research insights into practical implementations.


Additional Information: 	
	The role may require close collaboration with cloud infrastructure teams and external research collaborators.
	Candidates must be comfortable working in agile development environments and fast-paced innovation cycles.
	Occasional support for workshops, internal training sessions, or AI demonstrations may be requested.
	Strong documentation habits and the ability to communicate technical findings clearly to non-technical audiences will be an advantage.
	Willingness to adapt and retrain models based on changes in enterprise requirements or data availability.

title: Technical Business Analyst
description:
Job Summary
We are looking for a highly technical Business Analyst with a strong background in AI/Machine Learning integrations and enterprise system architecture. In this role, you will bridge the gap between complex business requirements and cutting-edge technical execution. You will play a critical role in analyzing data workflows, designing system integrations, and collaborating with our engineering team to deliver scalable, AI-driven digital solutions that transform customer engagement, automate digital operations, and optimize financial processes.

Key Responsibilities
1. Requirements Engineering: Collaborate with stakeholders across product, operations, and engineering to gather business requirements and translate them into deeply detailed technical specifications, APIs schemas, data models, and functional workflows.
2. AI & Automation Integration: Identify opportunities to embed AI/ML models, predictive analytics, and intelligent automation into existing core workflows to drive operational efficiency and advanced customer insights.
3. System & Data Analysis: Perform deep-dive data and system analysis. Map end-to-end data pipelines, system dependencies, and integration touchpoints between internal platforms and external financial/enterprise systems.
4. Technical Documentation: Document and maintain comprehensive functional/nonfunctional requirements, technical process flows, sequence diagrams, use cases, and technical user stories.
5. Engineering & Architecture Liaison: Work hand-in-hand with software engineers, data engineers, and AI specialists to ensure solution designs are technically feasible, scalable, and secure.
6. Agile Delivery Support: Actively participate in sprint planning, backlog grooming, and technical validation, ensuring clear alignment on acceptance criteria.
7. Testing & Validation: Define technical parameters for User Acceptance Testing (UAT), lead complex bug triaging, and validate that delivered system behaviors exactly match defined technical specs.
8. Stakeholder Communication: Serve as the technical translator, effectively communicating complex architectural, data, and AI concepts to non-technical business units and vice versa.

Requirements
1. Education: Bachelors degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Software Engineering, or a heavily quantitative field.
2. Experience: 3 to 5+ years of experience in a Technical Business Analyst or Systems Analyst role, preferably within a fast-paced Fintech, SaaS, or enterprise software environment.
3. Technical Architecture: Strong understanding of microservices architecture, RESTful/SOAP APIs, enterprise integration patterns, and relational/non-relational databases.

title: Android Application Developer
description:
Position Overview
We are seeking a skilled and driven Android Application Developer to join our technology team. In this role, you will design, develop, and maintain high-quality, fully native Android applications that complement our enterprise revenue workflow, cash flow management, and AI-driven automation solutions. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver secure, scalable mobile interfaces that integrate seamlessly with backend APIs and enterprise architectures.

Key Responsibilities
1) App Architecture & Development
 Design, build, and maintain high-quality native Android applications across multiple form factors (phones, tablets, and potentially ecosystem-extended devices).
 Ensure applications are highly responsive, optimized for performance, scalable, and follow modern Android design and performance standards.
 Maintain clean, maintainable, well-documented, and highly structured code bases.
2) Integration, Security & AI
 Integrate mobile applications with backend services via secure RESTful APIs and modern data synchronization protocols.
 Implement rigorous security measures, including data encryption, secure token management, and compliance with enterprise and financial data handling standards.
 Work closely with data and platform engineers to support AI-driven features and real-time notifications within the mobile ecosystem.
3) Testing & Continuous Improvement
 Write clean, maintainable code backed by automated testing (unit tests, integration tests) to identify bottlenecks and eliminate bugs.
 Support the full application lifecycle, from initial requirement refinement through to deployment on the Google Play Store.
 Stay up to date with the latest Android and mobile technologies, lead technical improvements, and benchmark against industry competitors.
4) Collaboration & Agile Delivery
 Collaborate with product owners, UI/UX designers, QA testers, and backend teams to define, design, and ship new features.
 Work effectively in an Agile/Scrum/Kanban environment: estimate user stories, refine technical requirements, and deliver iterative increments.
 Participate actively in code reviews, pull requests, and foster engineering best practices within the development team.

Job Requirements
1) Experience & Background
 Education: Bachelors degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline.
 Experience: Minimum of 3 years of native Android development experience.
 Portfolio: A proven track record well-supported by live, published applications in the Google Play Store.

2) Technical Skills
 Languages: Strong proficiency in Kotlin (understanding of Java is a plus).
 Frameworks & Core Tools: Deep understanding of the Android SDK, Android Architecture Components (e.g., ViewModel, LiveData), and asynchronous programming via Coroutines. Kotlin Multiplatform experience is a plus.
 Architecture: Strong familiarity with modern mobile architectures like MVVM or MVI, and a solid grasp of SOLID design principles.
 Dependency Injection: Hands-on experience with dependency injection frameworks such as Koin or Dagger/Hilt.
 UI/UX Execution: Experience with pixel-perfect UI implementation, custom views, animations, and multi-device support.
 DevOps & Tooling: Experience working with Git version control, code review workflows, and automated CI/CD pipelines.

3) Soft Skills & Attributes
 Good communication skills in English, with the ability to work effectively alongside distributed or cross-functional teams.
 An agile mindset: comfortable with iterative development, short feedback loops, and open to continuous refinement.
 Strong problem-solving abilities, root-cause analysis skills, and high attention to detail.

4) Preferred Qualifications
 Prior experience developing Financial Technology (FinTech), Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) extensions, or secure B2B mobile applications.

description:

	Minimum 5 years of hands-on technical experience with Oracle Retail applications (RMS, RPM, Allocation, ReIM, or related modules).

	Proficiency in Oracle APEX development for building and maintaining custom extensions, dashboards, and reports.
	Strong PL/SQL, SQL, and Oracle Database skills; experience with performance tuning and query optimisation.
	Hands-on experience with Oracle Retail POM (Purchasing and Operations Management) administration, including batch job management and operational monitoring.
	Experience with security administration: user management, RBAC, LDAP/SSO integration, and access audit processes.

	Experience supporting Oracle Retail in a BAU/production environment, including incident management and SLA adherence.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills in English.

	Experience with Oracle Cloud Infrastructure (OCI) or Oracle Retail Cloud deployments.

title: Collection & Recovery Strategy Analyst
description:
We are looking for an analytical, Collection and Recovery operationally experienced Strategy Specialist to bridge the gap between our debt collection platform and our clients day-to-day collection operations.

This role combines functional consulting, collections operations advisory, workflow optimization, and client engagement. The successful candidate will become a subject matter expert in our platform, understanding its features, workflow configuration, automation capabilities, and operational logic in depth.

You will work closely with clients onsite to observe how collection teams utilize the system in real operational environments, identify inefficiencies or process gaps, and recommend data-driven collection strategies and workflow improvements that enhance recovery performance, operational productivity, and user adoption. This role is ideal for candidates with strong exposure to collections operations, banking recovery, debt collection strategy, or functional consulting within enterprise software environments.

Key Responsibilities

Product & Functional Expertise

 Undergo intensive internal training to master the companys debt collection platform, including workflow configurations, business rules, automation logic, segmentation strategies, and operational features.
 Develop a strong understanding of how system configurations and workflow designs impact operational efficiency and recovery performance.
 Serve as a functional subject matter expert (SME) for internal teams and customers during implementation, optimization, and post-go-live support phases.

Client Operations Advisory

 Observe and understand client end-to-end collection operations, user behaviour, workflows, and management practices in real-world environments.
 Evaluate operational inefficiencies, manual workarounds, underutilized features, bottlenecks, and process gaps affecting recovery effectiveness.
 Analyze collection performance trends, operational behaviour, and workflow effectiveness using data-driven approaches.
 Recommend workflow improvements, automation enhancements, segmentation strategies, and operational optimization initiatives to improve collection outcomes.

Client Engagement & Consulting

 Conduct workshops, discussions, and presentations with operational users, collection managers, and business stakeholders.
 Translate business requirements and operational pain points into effective system configurations and workflow recommendations.
 Build trusted relationships with customer stakeholders by acting as a strategic advisor throughout implementation and optimization engagements.
 Support user adoption and change management initiatives to maximize system utilization and operational value.

Commercial & Solution Advisory

 Identify opportunities for additional modules, premium features, integrations, analytics capabilities, or workflow enhancements that improve customer productivity and recovery performance.
 Collaborate with Sales, Account Relationship Management, and Support teams in solution positioning and value-based discussions with customers.
 Provide operational insights and recommendations that contribute to long-term customer retention and account growth.

Product Improvement & Internal Collaboration

 Translate customer feedback, operational observations, and business pain points into actionable recommendations for Product and Engineering teams.
 Participate in internal discussions related to product enhancement priorities, workflow improvements, reporting requirements, and operational best practices.
 Contribute to continuous improvement of implementation methodologies, operational playbooks, and best practice frameworks.

Requirements

 Bachelors degree in Business Analytics, Data Analytics, Finance, Banking, or a related discipline.
 Minimum 35 years of experience in debt collection operations, collections strategy, banking recovery, or as a functional analyst/consultant for accounts receivable software.
 Proven ability to quickly learn complex enterprise software platforms and translate technical configurations into business outcomes.
 Strong capability to observe operational practices, identify inefficiencies or system workarounds, and develop data-driven optimization strategies.
 Commercial mindset with confidence to engage client stakeholders and present optimization or upsell recommendations.
 Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with ability to engage both operational teams and executive stakeholders.
 Willingness to travel and work onsite at customer locations during implementation, observation, and optimization phases.
